name: RxnRateBasis
description:
Global fluid equilibrium reaction rate basis.
     Absolute: Reaction rates represent absolute molar rates of change. 
     Per Unit Feed: Reaction rates are normalized based on the feed flow 
         rate. Representing the molar change per unit feed, they become
         independent of the absolute flow rate (preferred).

Both options yield identical results, but require different formulations
in the reaction Rate model. “Per Unit Feed” is recommended due to
better numerical stability when stream flows approach zero rate.
Starting with v2023 fluid reactions are defaulted to the "Per Unit Feed"
option.  The "Absolute" option is retained for compatibility with
simulations built before v2023 and will be removed in a future release.

name: ModeCheck
description: Global check for mode change warnings while still in Process mode

name: Elevations
description:
Global selection to enable the specification of equipment port elevations.
     Disabled: disable specifications for port elevations.  The elevation change (DE) can still be specified in the Pipe and PipeRig models.
     Manual: manually specify port elevations. DE in the Pipe and PipeRig models can be swapped for port elevation specifications.
     Automatic: automatically calculate port elevations using equipment geometry and configuration options for select models (Column, Drum, etc).

When automatic elevations are enabled, an elevation specification must be removed from each inlet stream of impacted models (for example, remove the DE specification from an inlet Pipe).
Other model elevations must still be manually specified. For an explanation of how port elevations are estimated, see each model's help file.

name: Feed

name: FeedTS
description: HX only tube side feed is connected

name: FeedSS

name: PhasesSS
description:
HX option to override the shell side fluid phase selection
     Fluid: The FluidType's phases are applied.
     Vapor: The phases are set to Vapor.
     Liquid: The phases are set to Liquid.
     VLE: The phases are set to VLE.
     VLWE: The phases are set to VLWE.
     VLLE: The phases are set to VLLE.

name: PhasesTS
description:
HX option to override the tube side fluid phase selection
     Fluid: The FluidType's phases are applied.
     Vapor: The phases are set to Vapor.
     Liquid: The phases are set to Liquid.
     VLE: The phases are set to VLE.
     VLWE: The phases are set to VLWE.
     VLLE: The phases are set to VLLE.

name: HXSideSSType
description: HX shell side replaceable model for pressure drop and heat transfer correlations.\nUse default HXSide or a custom HXSide model.

name: HXSideTSType
description: HX tube side replaceable model for pressure drop and heat transfer correlations.\nUse default HXSide or a custom HXSide model.
